footer.brandTagline: Southwest Florida's trusted family-owned roofing contractor since {{year}}. Specializing in premium residential and commercial roofing systems designed to withstand Florida's toughest weather.
footer.googleAria: Read CHS Roofing reviews on Google

hero.badge: Your Top Roofing Partner in Southwest Florida
hero.title: Protect Your Home With A
hero.subtitle: Licensed, insured, and family-owned. From quick hurricane repairs to premium full replacements, CHS Roofing delivers battle-tested quality you can trust.

stormBlock.title: Storm Damage? Don't Wait.
stormBlock.body: Florida storms can compromise your roof's integrity invisibly. We provide fast, emergency tarping, thorough inspections, and complete restoration services to protect your home.
stormBlock.imageAlt: Storm-damage tear-off and decking inspection in progress
stormBlock.quote: "Punctual, professional and experienced... Highly recommended." — Christine

servicesSection.title: Everything Your Roof Needs — In One Place
servicesSection.subtitle: From new installs to emergency hurricane response, our crews handle the full lifecycle of every roof we touch.

estimatorPromo.title: Get an instant
estimatorPromo.body: Pick your material, dial in pitch and complexity, and our estimator delivers a transparent ballpark price — no email or phone required.

whyChoose.title: We Treat Every Client Like Family
whyChoose.body: We don't just build roofs; we build lasting partnerships based on trust, security, and transparent communication. No hidden surprises.

items.title: Expert Craftsmanship
items.desc: Our knowledgeable team brings years of industry expertise to every single project.

items.title: Timely & Dependable
items.desc: Count on us to show up when promised and complete the job efficiently.

items.title: Licensed & Insured
items.desc: Complete peace of mind knowing your property is protected.

featuredProjects.title: Recent Roofs Across Southwest Florida
featuredProjects.subtitle: A small selection of recent residential and commercial roofs from Sanibel to Sarasota — built to weather the climate, designed to last.

credentials.title: Manufacturer Credentials
credentials.subtitle: We earn — and maintain — the highest installer certifications from the industry's leading manufacturers, unlocking premium warranties available only through credentialed contractors.

items.label: GAF® Certified Contractor
items.desc: Factory-certified to install GAF's premium shingle systems with extended manufacturer warranties available only through credentialed contractors.

items.label: TRI Alliance Tile Roofing
items.desc: Member of the Tile Roofing Industry Alliance — trained to current best-practice install standards for concrete and clay tile in Florida.

items.label: A+ Accredited Business
items.desc: Accredited by the Better Business Bureau with our highest possible A+ rating — zero unresolved complaints.

items.label: TAMKO® Authorized Installer
items.desc: Authorized installer of TAMKO Heritage® shingles with extended manufacturer warranty options on every install.

testimonialsSection.title: Don't Just Take Our Word For It

team.title: Meet Your Roofing Team
team.subtitle: Family-owned means you deal with the owners directly — not a call center.

finalCta.title: Ready For A
finalCta.subtitle: Get a free, honest assessment of your roof. No high-pressure sales tactics, just straight talk from local experts.

process.title: Our 6-Step Process
process.subtitle: A straightforward process built on transparency, craftsmanship, and respect for your home — from first inspection to final walkthrough.

steps.title: Free Inspection
steps.desc: Full evaluation of roof condition with photo documentation and a no-obligation report.

steps.title: Site Preparation
steps.desc: Protect property and prep the job site — landscaping, pool, and driveway covered.

steps.title: Tear-Off
steps.desc: Remove old roofing materials safely down to clean, sound decking.

steps.title: Dry-In
steps.desc: Install premium underlayment for full waterproofing before finish material goes on.

steps.title: Install
steps.desc: Install your new roofing system with code-rated fastening and precision finish work.

steps.title: Final Walkthrough
steps.desc: Quality check, magnet sweep, written warranty, and client approval before we leave.

fields.messagePlaceholder: Tell us anything that helps us prep your quote…

review.intro: Quick check — make sure everything looks right, then send it our way. We'll respond within 24 hours.
review.promise: We'll reach out within 24 hours with a transparent, no-pressure quote. Your info is never sold or shared.

success.title: Request Received!
success.body: Thank you for choosing CHS Roofing. Our team will contact you shortly to schedule your free estimate.
success.toastDesc: We'll be in touch shortly to provide your free quote.

contactForm.consent: By submitting, you agree to be contacted by CHS Roofing about your inquiry. See our

supportChat.intro: Hi! 👋 I'm the CHS Roofing assistant. I can connect you with the right person — I just need a few quick details first.
supportChat.askPhone: Thanks{{name}}! What's the best phone number to reach you?
supportChat.askService: Last one — which service do you need help with?
supportChat.ready: Perfect — I have everything I need. A CHS rep will reach out within business hours. If you'd like to talk now, give us a call or jump to the full quote form.
supportChat.thanks: Thanks{{name}}! Our team will reach out shortly. Want to talk now?

errors.name: Please share your first name.
errors.email: That email doesn't look quite right.

estimator.subtitle: Get a transparent ballpark price for your roof in under a minute. Pick your material, dial in the details, and we'll do the math — no email or phone number required.
estimator.imageAlt: Standing-seam metal roof on a Southwest Florida home

address.title: Property address
address.subtitle: Optional. We'll show a satellite preview so you can confirm the right home — your address is never stored or sent.
address.preview: Enter an address to see a satellite preview
address.previewBody: Auto-measuring roof area from satellite imagery is coming soon — for now, please enter the roof footprint below.

footprint.title: Roof footprint
footprint.subtitle: Approximate house footprint in square feet. (Roof area is calculated from this and your pitch.)

material.title: Roof material
material.subtitle: Pick the system you're considering. Pricing is per "square" (100 sq ft of roof).

tile-on-tile.label: Tile Off / Tile On
tile-on-tile.short: Tear off existing tile and install new tile.

tile-to-standing-seam.label: Tile Off / Standing Seam (with color)
tile-to-standing-seam.short: Tear off existing tile, install standing seam metal in your color.

material.colorOptionDesc: Adds ${{adder}} per square for a factory-baked color finish.

pitch.title: Roof Pitch
pitch.subtitle: Pick the option that best matches your roof. Pitch determines actual roof area on top of your home's footprint.

allowances.title: Allowances
allowances.subtitle: Defaults are typical for SWFL. Adjust if you know your job has unusual permitting or decking needs.

estimator.disclaimer: This is a rough estimate only. Final pricing requires an on-site inspection. Actual cost can vary based on roof geometry, decking condition, code upgrades, and material availability.
estimator.rateNote: Pricing is based on rates provided by CHS Roofing for {{region}}. Includes labor, standard materials, and underlayment. Excludes structural repairs, code upgrades, and HOA-required upgrades unless noted.
estimator.comingSoon: Working on auto-measuring roof area from satellite imagery — for now, please enter your home's footprint manually. The pitch field accounts for the steeper roof area on top of that footprint.
estimator.ctaSubtitle: Book a free on-site inspection and we'll deliver a fully line-itemed quote within 24–48 hours.

lp.heroSubtitle: Licensed, insured, and family-owned since {{year}}. Get a transparent, line-itemed quote within 24 hours — no high-pressure sales tactics.

benefits.title: Licensed & Insured
benefits.desc: Florida State License {{license}}. Fully insured. BBB Accredited A+.

benefits.title: Quote in 24 Hours
benefits.desc: On-site inspection scheduled in days. Written quote within 24–48 hours.

benefits.title: In-House Crews
benefits.desc: Never day labor. Owner-supervised installs you can actually trust.

benefits.title: Family-Owned Since {{year}}
benefits.desc: Local to {{city}}. Hundreds of completed projects across Southwest Florida.

lp.processTitle: 3 simple steps from inquiry to quote

process.title: Book your free inspection
process.desc: Fill out the form or call. We confirm a time that works for you.

process.title: We inspect, you don't lift a finger
process.desc: On-site evaluation with photos and documentation. No pressure, no upsell.

process.title: Get a transparent written quote
process.desc: Line-itemed estimate within 24–48 hours so you know exactly what you're paying for.

faqs.a: Yes. We do not charge for an on-site roof inspection or a written estimate. There is no obligation to book the project with us.
Most replacements are scheduled within 2–4 weeks; emergency repairs can usually be addressed the same week.
Yes — we document storm and hurricane damage thoroughly and work directly with your insurance carrier when needed.
All of Southwest Florida — Cape Coral, Fort Myers, Naples, Bonita Springs, Estero, Punta Gorda, Sanibel, North Port, and surrounding areas.

lp.finalCtaSubtitle: Tell us a bit about your property — our team will reach out within one business day to schedule.

installation.title: New Roof Installation
installation.short: Full residential and commercial roof installations built for SWFL.

repair.title: Roof Repair
repair.short: Fast, honest repair work — leaks, flashing, missing shingles, and more.

maintenance.title: Roof Maintenance
maintenance.short: Annual inspections and preventative care to extend your roof's life.

storm-damage.title: Storm Damage Restoration
storm-damage.short: Emergency tarping, inspections, and full hurricane-damage restoration.

specialty-roofing.title: Specialty Roofing
specialty-roofing.short: Skylights, custom flashing, chimney caps, and unique architectural roofs.

gutters.title: Gutters
gutters.short: Seamless aluminum gutters, downspouts, and gutter guards installed to spec.

roof-coating.title: Roof Coating & Restoration
roof-coating.short: Reflective coating systems that extend roof life and lower energy bills.

asphalt-shingles.title: Asphalt Shingles
asphalt-shingles.short: Affordable, durable, available in dozens of colors and styles.

metal.title: Metal Roofing
metal.short: Standing-seam metal — the gold standard for hurricane resistance.

tile.title: Tile Roofing
tile.short: Concrete and clay tile — Southwest Florida's classic look.

flat.title: Flat & TPO Roofing
flat.short: Energy-efficient flat systems for commercial and modern homes.
